DRAKOSHAS_UTILITY.Harrowing.Dialog.Title: Harrowing: Ritual Parameters
DRAKOSHAS_UTILITY.Harrowing.Dialog.DCPla: Leave empty to compute DC automatically
DRAKOSHAS_UTILITY.Harrowing.Warn.OnlyOne: Only one ritualist token must be selected.
DRAKOSHAS_UTILITY.Harrowing.Warn.Already: The target is already immune to Harrowing for the duration of the effect.
DRAKOSHAS_UTILITY.Harrowing.Error.Actors: Could not resolve the involved actors.
DRAKOSHAS_UTILITY.Harrowing.Error.NotCre: The ritualist must be a character or creature with skills.

DRAKOSHAS_UTILITY.Harrowing.Error.Insuff: Harrowing requires Occultism at Expert or higher, or Fortune-Telling Lore at Trained or higher.
DRAKOSHAS_UTILITY.Harrowing.Error.RollFa: Failed to roll the check for card {card}.
DRAKOSHAS_UTILITY.Harrowing.Error.SuitUn: Failed to determine the suit for card {card}. Ritual aborted.
DRAKOSHAS_UTILITY.Harrowing.Roll.SuitFla: Harrowing: determining the card suit for card {card}
DRAKOSHAS_UTILITY.Harrowing.Effect.Name: Effect: Harrowing ({suit})
DRAKOSHAS_UTILITY.Harrowing.Effect.Descr:
The creature may reroll any related check it has made, gaining a +4 status bonus to the reroll if the ritual was a critical success. If the ritual failed, it takes a -4 status penalty.

{degreeLabel}: {degreeName}

{checksLabel}: {checks}

{sourceLabel}: {casterName}

{rankLabel}: {rank}
DRAKOSHAS_UTILITY.Harrowing.Effect.Immun:
The target is immune to further Harrowing divinations for a month.

{sourceLabel}: {casterName}

{rankLabel}: {rank}
